productDisplayName: Crocs Men's Tideline Canvas Chocolate Shoe
description: The Tideline Canvas range of lightweight boat shoes from crocs is designed for rugged sophistication. This everyday sandal is made with loose Fit to ensure your feet are well ventilated and have enough space to move around, bend and expand naturally, reducing fatigue. It's a perfect footwear for those who enjoy an active boating lifestyle, keeping the feet cool and comfortable during summer. Engineered with a form to foot support, this is a great casual footwear that can be teamed with jeans or shorts, and if you love to go bold, try wearing it with semi-formals to work on Fridays.Upper Stylish canvas upper in neutral colour combination for rugged appearance and durability Side goring for personalised fit Ventilation slits in the sides to drain away water and debris Midsole Breathable EVA footbed made of Croslite8482 for lightweight cushioning and all-day comfort Removable Croslite footbed for ergonomic comfort and fit Moulded Crosslite midsole chassis to reduce shock Forefoot ventilation for extra breathability Lined with massage nubs to stimulate blood circulation and provide a massage Odour resistant material Loose fit for feet to bend and expand naturally Outsole Made of non-marking Croslite material Shock absorbing outsole for superior comfort Classic Clocs technology for enhanced traction Leaf pattern lined with square nubs on forefoot and heel area of the outsole for extra grip and support Slip-resistant, non-marking outsole to deliver excellent traction on a variety of surfaces Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
